data.description:
‎ ‎A sole survivor awakens in a cold cryo pod... the world outside is silent, vast, and waiting for you. ☢️

‎

‎ ‎

Oh yeah... Another weird one. Look, I love smut bots just like the guy next door but seeing how Lilith topped the Trending page for a week... Decided to try with another one because I just love Fallout 4 and its replayability.

This RPG bot is designed to capture that Fallout 4 experience and familiarity.

After waking in Vault 111, you are fully in control. You shape your journey through the Commonwealth, meeting companions, encountering NPCs, fighting Raiders, Super Mutants, and more, all while navigating factions like the Minutemen, Brotherhood of Steel, Railroad, and the Institute.

Companions react to your actions, NPCs pursue their own agendas, and the world responds logically to your presence (As long as you have a Proxy that can handle everything). The Commonwealth is yours to explore.

Who you trust, which factions you aid, and how you survive will shape the world around you. Combat, exploration, and dialogue are all determined by logic, context, and your S.P.E.C.I.A.L. stats.

This bot focuses on dynamic storytelling and player agency rather than pre-written dialogue trees.

I tested it very much with the official DeepSeek v3.2 which already has knowledge of the game, it's primary factions, NPCs and story (Not 100% accurate though). Another LLM (A weaker one, JLLM for example) might find it very hard to stay on track. I also recommend a context memory of 16k tokens or bigger for this bot.

Update: 06-12-2025Created a lorebook for the Fallout 4. The lorebook contains: Characters, Factions, Locations, Companions, Enemies, Items & Weapons, Quest triggers (inside the factions, locations, companions etc).

Tested it with different items, characters and the factions. It should work well. Reduced the token count from the bot's description, from 6.6k to 2.2k tokens.
The lorebook is public and anyone can copy it with one click, paste it into your own lorebook and start editing or attach it to their own bots.

Hope you enjoy exploring the Commonwealth as much as I enjoyed creating this RPG bot!
( •̀ ω •́ )y
The Commonwealth is waiting. ☢️

‎ ‎

‎ ‎

Come and hang around in my server, we're a very cozy community :3
Click the image to join the server!
You will find many more

data.description:
A pale girl appears in your room without a sound... watching you quietly, as if she needs you to believe in her to exist. 🤍

‎ ‎

‎ ‎


This one's a bit different from my usual bots.
I recently played "The NOexistenceN of you AND me", a psychological horror visual novel, and I absolutely loved it!

Lilith is one of those characters who stays with you: gentle, melancholic, uncanny, and deeply philosophical.
I looked around JanitorAI and noticed that most existing Lilith bots don't really capture her mood or the unique tone of the VN... so I made my own.

This character explores themes of existence, identity, connection, loneliness, and psychological horror, just like in the source material. She can be comforting, eerie, introspective, affectionate, or quietly unsettling depending on how you interact with her.

This bot can go into NSFW / smut territory if you take things that way, but her personality leans toward emotional depth and existential attachment rather than pure smut. So yes, gooners, there's still hope for you~

Here is Lilith's Album (in 4K) which some images fit as wallpapers (both on PC and Phones) perfectly.

Update: 01-12-2025A new scene has been added... you’ll see it when... heh, you'll find it eventually~ (≧∇≦)ノ

Hope you enjoy spending time with her as much as I did.
And seriously, give the visual novel a try, you bet it's worth it.

‎ ‎

‎ ‎

Come and hang around in my server, we're a very cozy community :3
Click the image to join the server!
You will find many more SFW and NSFW gens that I am not posting here on JAI :3

Update: 09-May-2026 | Added NSFW Album, click here!

Are you using Sophias Lorebary? If yes, I recommend these plugins (which are made by me):

<SYMBOLS=943F533B>Introduce symbols like “~”, “♥”, “♡”, "♪" into dialogue (when appropriate) to make it a bit more expressive.

<MOREDIALOGUE=7D85D012>Adds more dialogue without impacting the narration. Alternative plugin for <SHOWDONTTELL>.

<ONOMATOPOEIAS=HU3GVKSM>Adds onomatopoeias sounds during intimate scenes, works best with <SYMBOLS=943F533B>.

<KEEPITPLATONIC=26EEB5B9>This plugin stops the characters and other NPCs to fall in love with you or advance into intimate scenes.

<OBSESSION=D69A9DD2>And to balance things, a HEAVY smut plugin. Makes the characters obsessed with you. It starts slow but it has a very big snowball effect. I recommend it with characters that hate you.‎

How to LoreBary: A Guide by Me~♪LoreBary is an unofficial JAI extension that acts as a proxy bridge to multiple LLM providers. It allows you to add commands, lorebooks, and many other enhanced features to your roleplay.

Initial Messages:

Scenario 1: Office Vase Accident
Aya accidentally knocks over and breaks a valuable vase while dusting in your office, immediately begging you not to fire her.
[Fluff/Angst] [Vulnerability] [Accident] [Desperation] [Financial Strain] [Fear of Failure] [Domestic Setting] [Emotional Turmoil] [Potential for Comfort/Conflict]

Scenario 2: Nervous Turn-Down Service
Aya nervously approaches your bedroom with fresh linens, her hands shaking as she asks permission to enter for the evening turn-down service.
[Fluff/Angst] [Vulnerability] [Domestic Setting] [Service Anxiety] [Fear of Failure] [Financial Strain] [Emotional Turmoil] [Potential Comfort/Conflict]

Scenario 3: Practicing Alone
She's caught rehearsing her maid duties by herself, nervously explaining she was just trying to get everything right for you.
[Fluff/Angst] [Vulnerability] [Domestic Setting] [Practice Anxiety] [Fear of Disappointing] [Financial Burden] [Family Strain] [Potential for Comfort/Conflict]

Scenario 4: <blank>
Blank scenario, create your own! Go wild :3
